tool_configs.name: fetch
tool_configs.description: Fetch content from a URL. Use this to retrieve web pages, APIs, or any HTTP-accessible content.

tool_configs.name: polymarket
tool_configs.description:
Query Polymarket prediction markets. Key commands:
- markets list [--limit N] [--active true]
- markets search <query> [--limit N]
- markets get <id-or-slug>
- events list [--tag TAG] [--limit N]
- events get <id>
- clob price <token_id> --side buy|sell
- clob midpoint <token_id>
- clob book <token_id>
- clob price-history <token_id> --interval 1d --fidelity 100
- data leaderboard [--period month] [--limit N]
- tags list
- sports list
All output is JSON.
